sections.text:
1. three / thirteen / thirty
2. twenty / twelve / thirty
3. forty-six / fifty-eight / forty-eight

1. (Where / What) do (they / you) live?
2. (You / I) live (in / on) Oakville.
3. (Oh / Yes) really? (You, / Me.) too.
4. (I) (like / love) it. It's a (nice / nine) place.
